title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§482. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Twenty-Second Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:481.
doc_text:
§482.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the
Twenty-Second Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it
prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the
salary fixed in R.S. 16:481.
